# Voprosy Filosofii — Author Guidelines (Synthetic Fixture)

**Journal:** Voprosy Filosofii
**Publisher:** Russian Academy of Sciences
**ISSN:** 0042-8744
**URL:** https://www.example-vf.ru

## Aims and Scope

Voprosy Filosofii is a leading peer-reviewed journal publishing research in all
areas of philosophy, including history of philosophy, epistemology, ethics,
social philosophy, and philosophy of science.

## Article Types

- **Research Article** (up to 40,000 characters): original philosophical research
- **Review Essay** (up to 20,000 characters): critical review of philosophical works
- **Discussion** (up to 15,000 characters): response to published articles

## Submission Requirements

- **Abstract:** 200-250 words
- **Keywords:** 5-10
- **Metadata:** Title, abstract, and keywords must be in Russian AND English
- **Citation style:** follow journal format (see recent issues)

## Language Policy

The journal is a Russian-language journal. All articles must be submitted in Russian.
Bilingual metadata (Russian and English) is required for international indexing.

## Peer Review

- **Model:** Single-blind review
- **Timeline:** 3-6 months

## Indexing

Scopus, Web of Science ESCI, RSCI, VAK
